2603.23916.title: DecepGPT: Schema-Driven Deception Detection with Multicultural Datasets and Robust Multimodal Learning
2603.23916.paper_summary: Multimodal deception detection aims to identify deceptive behavior by analyzing audiovisual cues for forensics and security. In these high-stakes settings, investigators need verifiable evidence connecting audiovisual cues to final decisions, along with reliable generalization across domains and cultural contexts. However, existing benchmarks provide only binary labels without intermediate reasoning cues. Datasets are also small with limited scenario coverage, leading to shortcut learning. We address these issues through three contributions. First, we construct reasoning datasets by augmenting existing benchmarks with structured cue-level descriptions and reasoning chains, enabling model output auditable reports. Second, we release T4-Deception, a multicultural dataset based on the unified ``To Tell The Truth'' television format implemented across four countries. With 1695 samples, it is the largest non-laboratory deception detection dataset. Third, we propose two modules for robust learning under small-data conditions. Stabilized Individuality-Commonality Synergy (SICS) refines multimodal representations by synergizing learnable global priors with sample-adaptive residuals, followed by a polarity-aware adjustment that bi-directionally recalibrates representations. Distilled Modality Consistency (DMC) aligns modality-specific predictions with the fused multimodal predictions via knowledge distillation to prevent unimodal shortcut learning. Experiments on three established benchmarks and our novel dataset demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both in-domain and cross-domain scenarios, while exhibiting superior transferability across diverse cultural contexts. The datasets and codes will be released.
2603.23916.paper_summary_zh: 多模態欺騙檢測旨在通過分析視聽線索來識別欺騙行為，以用於法醫和安全。在這些高風險的環境中，調查人員需要可驗證的證據，將視聽線索與最終決策聯繫起來，並在不同領域和文化背景中實現可靠的泛化。然而，現有的基準僅提供二元標籤，而沒有中間推理線索。數據集也很小，場景覆蓋有限，導致捷徑學習。我們通過三項貢獻來解決這些問題。首先，我們通過用結構化的線索級描述和推理鏈增強現有基準來構建推理數據集，使模型輸出可審計報告。其次，我們發布了 T4-Deception，這是一個基於統一的「說實話」電視格式的多文化數據集，該格式在四個國家實施。該數據集擁有 1695 個樣本，是最大的非實驗室欺騙檢測數據集。第三，我們提出了兩個模塊，以在小數據條件下進行穩健學習。穩定化的個體性-共性協同（SICS）通過將可學習的全局先驗與樣本自適應殘差協同來細化多模態表示，隨後進行極性感知調整，雙向重新校準表示。提煉的模態一致性（DMC）通過知識蒸餾將模態特定的預測與融合的多模態預測對齊，以防止單模態捷徑學習。在三個已建立的基準和我們的新數據集上進行的實驗表明，我們的方法在領域內和跨領域場景中均達到了最先進的性能，同時在不同文化背景中展現出優越的可轉移性。數據集和代碼將會發布。
2603.23916.author: Jiajian Huang et.al.
2603.23916.authors: Jiajian Huang, Dongliang Zhu, Zitong YU, Hui Ma, Jiayu Zhang, Chunmei Zhu, Xiaochun Cao
